text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Waaagh! I lost again! I'm on a losing streak!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
This is proof I still lack power. My muscles weren't
enough to break ahead...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I can't forgive myself for being so weak!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I need to redouble my training sets ASAP!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... There's not a minute to waste!
choice_data_list: Okay, but let's not overdo it with the training.
You know what they say, time is muscle!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Urk! Y-you're right... Even if I up my workouts, my
muscles won't improve immediately.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
But if I don't work out enough, I'll get bummed
out!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: P-please... just let me do a hundred squats!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: That's right! Gotta spend some to gain some!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: A jacked body will never let you down, so...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I gotta put more muscle into my training!
